queries.question: For each farm stay, show the activity descriptions it offers.
queries.sql: select farm_stays.name , activities.description from Farm_Stays_Activities join Activities on Farm_Stays_Activities.activity_id = Activities.activity_id join Farm_Stays on Farm_Stays_Activities.farm_stay_id = Farm_Stays.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?farm_stays_activities a :Farm_Stays_Activities .
  ?activities a :Activities .
  ?farm_stays_activities p:hasActivities ?activities .
  ?farm_stays a :Farm_Stays .
  ?farm_stays_activities p:hasFarm_Stays ?farm_stays .
  ?farm_stays p:name ?name .
  ?activities p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What is the description of each activity for each farm stay?
queries.sql: SELECT Activities.description  from Farm_Stays_Activities join Activities on Farm_Stays_Activities.activity_id = Activities.activity_id join Farm_Stays on Farm_Stays_Activities.farm_stay_id = Farm_Stays.id   GROUP BY Farm_Stays_Activities.activity_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Farm_Stays_Activities.farm_stay_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Farm_Stays)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the description of each activity for each farm stay?
